verses.text: A door opened in heaven; John is called up, and sees 'a throne... set in heaven, and one sat,' like jasper, ringed by a rainbow. The throne. All heaven centres on the One enthroned.
A door opened in heaven; John is called up, and sees 'a throne... set in heaven, and one sat,' like jasper, ringed by a rainbow. The throne. All heaven centres on the One enthroned.
A door opened in heaven; John is called up, and sees 'a throne... set in heaven, and one sat,' like jasper, ringed by a rainbow. The throne. All heaven centres on the One enthroned.
Around it twenty-four elders crowned in white, and 'seven lamps of fire... the seven Spirits of God,' with lightnings and thunders. Surrounded. Redeemed and Spirit attend the throne.
Around it twenty-four elders crowned in white, and 'seven lamps of fire... the seven Spirits of God,' with lightnings and thunders. Surrounded. Redeemed and Spirit attend the throne.
Four living creatures, full of eyes, rest not, saying, 'Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty, which was, and is, and is to come.' Ceaseless praise. Heaven never tires of God's holiness.
Four living creatures, full of eyes, rest not, saying, 'Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty, which was, and is, and is to come.' Ceaseless praise. Heaven never tires of God's holiness.
Four living creatures, full of eyes, rest not, saying, 'Holy, holy, holy, Lord God Almighty, which was, and is, and is to come.' Ceaseless praise. Heaven never tires of God's holiness.
The elders fall down, cast their crowns, and cry, 'Thou art worthy, O Lord, to receive glory... for thou hast created all things.' Worthy Creator. Heaven crowns God for making all.
